extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE. Version 3, 29 June 2007
extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon does not host any of the content which is found and has no affiliation with any of the content providers.[CR]The author is in no way affiliated with Kodi, Team Kodi, or the XBMC Foundation.
extension.summary: POV Fork — What you like to watch.[CR]
extension.description: POV Fork — A maintained fork of the POV video addon for Kodi. This is a Non-profit resource, organized solely for educational purposes which is protected under the Fair-Use doctrine of the Copyright Act, Specifically section 107, which does promote freedom of expression, by permitting the unlicensed use of copyright-protected works.
extension.news: INFO: For latest changes see Changelog within add-on.

extension.description: Proxies Kodi's web interface and selected management commands through an authenticated outbound WebSocket connection with diagnostics and binary-safe response handling.

extension.summary: Browse M3U + TMDB with debrid-cached torrents via Torrentio indexer
extension.description: [B]Helix[/B] is a single Kodi add-on that fuses a clean, TMDB-driven browse experience with a full maintenance toolkit. Open one icon to browse Movies / TV / Anime with poster art and info, or flip to the Tools tab for Account Manager, Maintenance, Backup/Restore, Speedtest, Logs and more. Helix now includes a Torrentio indexer that converts TMDB titles to torrent streams, checks debrid cache, and presents quality-grouped results. Links resolve through Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize or TorBox when configured.
extension.disclaimer: Helix is a content-neutral tool. It does not host, scrape or link to any third-party media. The user is responsible for the content of any M3U playlist or debrid service they configure.
extension.news: 0.3.0 - New: Torrentio indexer integration — TMDB movie browsing now fetches debrid-cached torrent streams with quality grouping (4K/1080p/720p/480p) and seed counts. New debrid_search module converts TMDB→IMDB ID, queries Torrentio API, checks debrid cache, and groups results by quality tier. Magnet support added to debrid resolver. New 'list_tmdb_title' and 'list_tmdb_titles' router actions. 0.2.0 - New: Dashboard mode (Debug / Logs / Settings / Actions / About). New: in-addon log viewer with Helix-only + errors-only filters and full-log export. New: flat settings list with one-tap edit (bool toggle / enum picker / text input). New: Action buttons — clear cache, refresh M3U, test TMDB key, test debrid, run speedtest, restart service, dump debug to log. 0.1.3 - Fix: addonvar relative import (was .utils, now ..utils). Fix: strings.po converted from XML to proper gettext PO format. Service should now start cleanly.
